headline: A Rare Buying Opportunity May Be Here With This Top Stock

headline: Goldman Sachs Maintains Buy Rating on Intuitive Surgical (ISRG)
summary: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (NASDAQ:ISRG) is one of the 10 Best Debt-Free S&P 500 Stocks to Buy Now. On May 27, 2026, Goldman Sachs lowered the firm’s price target on Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (NASDAQ:ISRG) to $558 from $621 and maintained a Buy rating on the shares. Goldman Sachs said MedTech has gone through one of its […]
